overview: This is an albino Anolis capito (big-headed anole) lizard. It is characterized by a lack of melanin, resulting in a pale, translucent appearance, which is extremely rare in the wild. Due to their inability to blend in with their surroundings, albino anoles have a very low survival rate and rarely reach adulthood.
